name: Carmen Miranda
abstract: Maria do Carmo Miranda da Cunha (9 February 1909 – 5 August 1955), known professionally as Carmen Miranda (Portuguese pronunciation: [ˈkaʁmẽj miˈɾɐ̃dɐ]), was a Portuguese-born Brazilian singer, dancer, and actress. Nicknamed "the Brazilian Bombshell," she was known for her signature fruit hat outfits that she wore in her American films.

concerts.label: All-Star Benefit Concert: Booker T. Washington Memorial Fund

about_quotes.speaker: Mario Bauza
about_quotes.evidence: Every night, nothing but a celebrity, (inaudible) Bing Crosby, Carmen Miranda, all the big, every (inaudible) Bing Crosby (inaudible). I got pictures of all of that.

about_quotes.evidence: We had Carmen Miranda, the Dead End Kids, Bing Crosby - Bing Crosby was every night out there.
